problem.title: Managing a building shouldn't be this hard

items.title: Lost announcements
items.description: Important information gets lost in WhatsApp groups

items.title: Untracked voting
items.description: Paper or email voting with no traceability

items.title: Paper bookings
items.description: Common area bookings done on paper at the front desk

items.title: Uninformed residents
items.description: Residents who don't know what's happening in their building

solution.title: Meet Linvo
solution.description: Linvo is the platform that centralizes all your building's management and communication in one place. Modern, simple, and built for those who live in and manage residential communities.

items.title: Noise-free communication
items.description: Organized announcements, documents, and notices. No more information lost in WhatsApp groups.

items.title: Democratic decisions
items.description: Digital polls and votes with transparent results and full traceability.

items.title: Conflict-free spaces
items.description: Common area bookings with clear rules, visual calendar, and automatic confirmation.

items.title: Everything on record
items.description: Requests and incidents with real-time tracking. Nothing gets lost.

items.title: Trusted services
items.description: A directory of community-rated service providers. Find who you need with confidence.

items.title: Transparent finances
items.description: Bills, financial reports, and statements accessible anytime from your phone.

social_proof.invite_text: Join the first building managers and administrators

items.question: What is Linvo?
items.answer: Linvo is a modern platform that centralizes all your building's management and communication. Announcements, voting, bookings, incidents, and finances all in one place.

items.question: Who is Linvo for?
items.answer: For professional building managers, resident managers, and property management companies who want to modernize management and improve the resident experience.

items.question: How much will it cost?
items.answer: We're defining affordable plans for buildings of all sizes. First participants in the pilot program will have free access.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Linvo follows security best practices and complies with LGPD (Brazil's data protection law). Your data is encrypted and securely stored.

items.question: Does it work for small buildings?
items.answer: Yes. Linvo was designed for buildings of all sizes, from small apartments to large residential complexes.

items.question: What happens after I join the waitlist?
items.answer: You'll receive email updates on the platform's progress and be invited to join the free pilot program as spots become available.

items.question: Do I need to replace my current system?
items.answer: Not necessarily. Linvo can complement existing tools or completely replace manual processes like WhatsApp groups and spreadsheets.

items.question: How is it different from WhatsApp groups or spreadsheets?
items.answer: Linvo is a dedicated platform with organized announcements, traceable voting, automated bookings, and complete history. Everything in one place, without the noise and disorganization of messaging groups.
